name: Rival Stars Horse Racing: VR Edition

reviews.review_description: I really love this game a lot as the quality and gameplay are super good. You can choose from flat racing to cross country or free play, even multiplayer, and I know it is all pretty accurate because I ride horses irl. But it would be pretty cool if you could have servers for different game modes like cross country, flat racing, roam in multiplayer and maybe use audio proximity chat for some of them. But, this game is great for single player and it is definitely worth the price.

reviews.review_title: Fun! But could use more content.
reviews.review_description: Like the title says this game is pretty fun. It took a bit to get used to the controls as a non irl rider but once I got the hang of it I found myself enjoying it more. I do wish there were more free roam content but I would recommend this game as it is nice to care for and ride your virtual ponies.

reviews.review_title: What happened to the New Tracks
reviews.review_description: It has been over a year or more now and it still says Coming Soon! That is not soon and I’m wandering if there are more Tracks that are even coming to the game.
Controls were a little hard but with practice you can do it easy and it was so fun to play and brought realism and fantasy to life

reviews.review_title: Brilliant but potential to be better!
reviews.review_description:
I love playing this, love the breeding, love the controls for racing (I have the odd struggle but that’s mainly my fault), and I like the story line and the competitiveness of it. I’ve completed the storyline now though and I find myself getting bored. I’m hoping that there is going to be another update soon, more content, maybe show jumping like on mobile (I know that takes a lot of time but I feel like it would be fun for vr), multiplayer free roam would be amazing as well as it gets lonely after a while . I like the multiplayer racing,but it would be nice if it wasn’t only set to people on the same network as you. 
Overall, a game that is high quality and worth the money, but some good updates are needed! 
Thank you.
I really enjoy this game. So very well done. I love racing and breeding. Love everyone of my virtual horses. Wish the multiplayer was used more. That has potential to be really fun.

I love this game, but I wish you could connect your desktop or mobile game to it but other than that, it’s really fun and I definitely recommend it especially if you know somebody who loves horses or rival stars 
🐴🥰🍏￼
Just weird game I wanted my money on for no updates

I used to ride, and this is such a fun throw-back feeling. The races are engaging and challenging, and the jumping is fun. I do wish we had a little more content available and I’m not a big multi player person, so I can’t judge that. But it’s definitely a great game at a good price point.
This game is so fun but there needs to be more things to to and more levels. Keep up the good work!!
The game is really good, amazing horses and easy controls but the game gets borning after a while.This game needs more updates

reviews.review_title: When will the next update be?
reviews.review_description:
It's very interesting!

The realism of the operation and the immersion of the race are the best.

I'm enjoying the real jockey while moving my body to the fullest.

And please add new flatland courses and obstacle race courses in your next update.

If possible, I would like to increase the number of courses with the motif of Japanese racecourses.

Well I previously said how those who pre-ordered the game got a discount which I didn't. But that's in the past now. This game seems like it is going to die. There were updates every month after launch now it seems like an abandoned game. The reason I say that is that the mobile and PC ones are constantly getting new things. The community is constantly asking if anyone has heard about an update. So their priority is not this since it didn't make em the money they expected, nor have they put a statement out. All this is solely an observation. Hope the devs got something HUGE planned cause at this point giving us new missions new patterns and colors are just not gonna cut it. Even if the store is included. If all this was trickled slowly, me and probably many others would be estatic on what will come next. Excitement is gone for me. And the mechanics many say suck. It's skill issue sorry to say cause I have no problem turning the horse plus u have to upgrade the horse to have better turn. Other than that don't take this as hate. More like disappointed 😞
It’s a good game but I think there should be more disciplines  like jumping ect plus being able to lead the horse but I think it’sa very good game ￼

reviews.review_title: Good game multiplayer needs work though
reviews.review_description: Game is great but after a few hours you have the top horses and if you go from the front you’ll win every race I find myself missing the start on purpose to make it feel competitive, I would love there to be a national hunt mode have courses like Cheltenham etc would be very good, multiplayer is very disappointing I’ve played about 100 races multiplayer and only ever raced someone real once but I think the most important thing is national hunt mode and I’d love for there to be procushs would make it more realistic add a setting so you can ride with or without them as I’d imagine some people wouldn’t want to

I really like this game at home. It's games like this that make VR investment worthwhile. However, what disappoints me is the lack of updates compared to their other platforms. I understand that more complex programming is involved, but I don't feel they should introduce a game if they are not prepared to update and maintain it regularly.
I'm looking forward to the next update, which I hope will be substantial, and I'm also curious about when the jump races will be available. When that does come to the game, I would like it to be highly realistic, including unseating the rider, falls, and other elements. It would make this game another level.
It needs faster updates and breeds like feathery horses!!!
10/10 experiance, i became johnny joestar, beautiful game. Add stands and steel balls then itd be 11/10

I have no experience riding but I am a fan of Horse racing.  My Father loved the track so once or twice a year we would go to a local track and bet on the Horses and it is a great memory I will never forget.  He has passed but I will never forget those trips.  This game brings me some nostalgia and peace of mind.  
It's a great game with solid mechanics.  Graphics and audio are great.  Overall it is worth a spot in anyone's library especially if you love Horses.

Breeding for new horses its jus too random stats wise etc, i understand it in theory but in terms of a game its wildly too random & needs adjustments, i need a grade 5 horse and the cost of the studs is outrageous tbh and even then ya looking at a 75% to 80% chance of getting a grade 5 horse + you'll obviously prefer/need a mare for when you need a grade 6 horse, even when you find a perfect A+ in every category stud, you still more often then not end up with a pretty bad horse stat wise yaself, then you have to hope it can run the distance of the race & is suited to the turf your running on,,, it leaves Alot to "Chance" which i understand but at 700K+ a stud, and currently im having to rerun the cross country race 5 agen & agen to earn money (17K a time) that gameplay loop is pretty ridiculous, 

I also just spent 700K+ tryna get a grade 6 horse only to end up with a bad stat grade 5 again, i leveled it up fully and bonded with it to the max and i can only sell it for 60K,,, if that sounds fair or fun to you then buy the game, if not then definitely skip this game,
The game is glitching and is making me tall, no way to fix it. I have finished all the races, and there are no new updates.

Really good VR game.
Flat racing and cross country really good.
Shame national hunt racing isn’t on it.  Hopefully there will be and update with it included. 🙏
This program doesn't tell you what the buttons on your controller is plus I've fed...brushed etc beginner horse is but no racing. When u go to race...nothing works. In my opinion...NOT worth $19.99.

This game is very fun but I wish there was more too do. Since it feels like really being with a horse it would be cool if there was more care you could do for the horse like bathing or pouring grain into a bucket to feed it. I’m not sure what happened because I always save  after playing but when I logged in today multiple of my horses were just gone. Not sure what to do about this

So I decided to download this game because why not? Well this game is almost like riding a real horse but after a while it gave me motion sickness and a feeling like car sickness. 
Flat racing: wonderful! Though it is a little hard to sprint but it’s amazing. I love trying to beat the other people though I did notice that the NPC’s had a shadow and I didn’t. 
Cross country: 8/10. The turning part is super difficult the horse had a really wide turn and not a great turning system. Other than that the cross country is super fun. 
Breeding/stable: 10/10. I love not having to wait for breeding and it is like 30 seconds on like every breed. Also I love how the place starts off with 8 stalls and 6 pasture slots. 
Things I think we should be able to do: And a lead rope and halter; so we can lead the horse to the pasture or a trailer. Trailer: we can load the horse up to go to events. Grooming system we can lead a horse somewhere and wash the horse and groom it, other than just grooming it in the stall. Tack system: I wish we could tack up the horses and have a tack room and feed room. Also I wish we had like everyday horse tasked, like mucking out, hoof picking, feeding, watering. Line all the basic stuff! 
Overall this game is amazing and I would recommend getting it especially if you love horses! Thank you for reading this and I hope this will help with your decision ￼

Very fun game so far! I hope in the future, they expand the game for a more sandbox game play like barn chores, taking care of the horses, and maybe some free play trail riding or imcluding other horse breeds. Would be fun to add an adventure element for those who dont want to compete every day! Not lots of horse games out there so this one has a lot of potential for more expansion!

reviews.review_title: I love it, but I am hoping for more
reviews.review_description:
This is incredible so much better than the phone version, but I am hoping they can add these improvements to make it a 5-star rating

1. Clean stalls for more caring for the horse by getting a wheelbarrow and a pitchfork, cleaning the poop with the pitchfork, throwing it in the wheelbarrow and than throwing it out. Getting either straw or sawdust to put in the stall

2. Having a feed trough and water bucket in the stall so you can feed and water the horse. Having a water hose by the barn to fill up the bucket than a food storage room to choose either hay grain pellets or oats

3. Having a wash room to wash your horse and also to clean your horse hoofs 

4. Having a tack room so you can pick up the saddle birdle and saddle pad(choosing a color or design) to put on the horse

5. Having a halter outside the stall to put on the horse so you can take it outside and put it in the pasture

6. Having a lunge paddock to lunge your horse

Just like Horse and Hoof

reviews.review_title: Its pretty cool but just want some impro
reviews.review_description: The graphics are really cool, so realistic but I wish the actual caring of the horse was realistic as well. Like buckets of hey, mucking out stalls, pick hooves. Also daily turn out and also be able to just ride freely like maybe some trail riding in there. *Oh and lets add some herding cattle! ☆maybe some rodeo stuff in there too, western saddles too. NOTE: GLITCH, there seems to be a glitch when I move a mare to the stable to breed and when I try to breed it says "no mare available in the stable" when I literally put them there a second ago. So I play a race or cross country course and then it says there there in the stable
Awesome game hoping for some more stuff from the mobile game in the future such as different horse breeds , horse market and more free roam areas ect really excited to see where this game goes

This game has a lot of potential. I have been playing for a few hours a day for the last 3 days, unfortunately I've already done all of the races there was, with "Coming Soon" as the "next" thing. I am hoping to have a little more interaction with the horses, and maybe a branch into English events? Maybe even western events, idk, there is a lot of possibilities that this game can do. Hoping the updates come soon, and as well done as the beginning!
I super duper love this game! its worth buying if you love horses!

reviews.review_title: Best VR Game for Horse lovers
reviews.review_description: I played this game on my iPad for years and is one of those games I always go back to. Once I found thas been a VR release of this I bought it and I cannot believe how fantastic it is you literally are amerced into the game of having to ride like a jockey. Breed your horses for better sats. Win trophies, ride cross country and free roam on a nice hack, chill with your horse with grooming, feeding and petting. Unlike any game I’ve ever experienced. Thankyou so much pikpok you outdone yourself cannit wait to keep playing

I really appreciate that you can move up the stats of your horse by interactively bonding with it. The first races and cross country were amazing to experience until now.
Improvement suggestions: 1) let us earn money with the multiplayer races
2) Let us be able to make friends with others to help each other breed new horses
3) coming back to the previous, breeding is only possible with mares, so indeed you sell the stallions. Yet would be nice if you could at least use the mare of your friend instead of having to sell your stallion. Now my stables has only mares.
4) this last request would be more than a nice extra. It would be beyond my dreams if we could also compete in tournaments as multiplayers for cross country.
Theres never any updates like I want more cross country or like I want to see myself in the game so I could pick want to where it qould akso be nice ifyou could do more freeplay modes
I loved this game ever since I got it. I unlocked multiple trophies,won multiple races, had so much fun breeding horses. You should buy this game for all the hype!
I love it so much it feels like I am riding a real horse
it is super fun and engaging as someone who cannot own a horse. it shows real life chores with horses such as feeding them treats/brushing/turning them out and more!

reviews.review_title: Brilliant game… but controls are glitchy
reviews.review_description: Overall I’m really impressed with this game and how immersive it is. Definitely a good buy! The only real let down is how clunky the steering is in the cross country.. I literally can’t seem to get past the first race as steering seems to be non existent. My horse will either get stuck in the fence or just bypass the jumps completely.. very frustrating! If this could be fixed it will be a 5 star game for sure!
How do you breed and get more horses. when you are about to finish a race all the other horses and riders go so so fast so how do you go fast.pls pls
Just needs more racetracks for flat racing, hoping some could come out
But how do you go on the horse market 🤔

I was looking forward to this game so much that I purchased a horseback riding machine and equipped it with a saddle. I used to ride a lot when I was younger, and this game really brought me back. The feeling of being in a jockey stance while racing on the machine feel so realistic to me. Not to mention the Cross Country. Jumping out of my saddle whenever the horse leaps over a jump and pushing my arms forward is such a familiar motion for me, I really get into it. Just 30 minute of playing and it feels like I ran a marathon I get so enthralled in the world. I would LOVE to see what other ideas the team can bring to the equestrian world of VR. There is very little to no VR horse games out there and this one tops it, easily. I don't feel motion sick at all (not sure if it is because of my machine that helps imitate riding). I would love it if they put in the show jumping courses, as I think that would be a great challenge when put in an arena!
The only con I can think of, that has already been said, is that the sprint mechanic is a little clunky. However, I found that if you let go of your reins and re-grip them, it kinda resets everything and allows you to start pushing that sprint immediately.
Overall, I am very pleased with what is presented so far and I can't wait to see what additions will be added.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your feedback - we're stoked to hear that you enjoyed the game so much :)

And I appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts on the sprint mechanics - we've received a lot of good feedback on this, and if you have any further thoughts, feel free to reach out here, or via support@pikpok.com :)

reviews.review_description:
I could never in several lifetimes afford to own a horse, but this gave me so much joy. Especially being a fan of the racing, this is all around one of my favorite games and it legitimately brought tears of joy to my eyes when I first played it. I waited since the first announcement and was not disappointed.

I look forward to the new races, whenever they get added :)

developer_response.body: Aw thank you, we are stoked to hear that you have enjoyed the game :)

reviews.review_description: I LOVE IT

I got say when this first came out I brought it I didn’t like it I kept getting last place everytime I couldn’t figure how to control the horse speed and stuff but more I played got better now I know what to do graphic are awesome does feel realistic horses is my family farm animals so cool how you take care of them like real life great jobs devs on the game if your fan of horses and racing this is the game but ignore the haters who buys games then talk bad about them just get your refund back and shut up lol

𝘙𝘪𝘷𝘢𝘭 𝘴𝘵𝘢𝘳𝘴 𝘪𝘴 𝘮𝘺 𝘧𝘢𝘷𝘰𝘳𝘪𝘵𝘦 𝘨𝘢𝘮𝘦 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘐 𝘭𝘰𝘷𝘦 𝘩𝘰𝘸 𝘪𝘵 𝘧𝘪𝘯𝘢𝘭𝘭𝘺 𝘤𝘢𝘮𝘦 𝘰𝘶𝘵 𝘰𝘯 𝘝𝘳 𝘱𝘭𝘶𝘴 𝘱𝘦𝘳𝘧𝘦𝘤𝘵 𝘵𝘪𝘮𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘴𝘱𝘳𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘣𝘳𝘦𝘢𝘬 𝘴𝘵𝘢𝘳𝘵𝘴 𝘵𝘰𝘥𝘢𝘺 𝘫𝘶𝘴𝘵 𝘰𝘯𝘦 𝘳𝘦𝘲𝘶𝘦𝘴𝘵 𝘵𝘰 𝘢𝘥𝘥 𝘸𝘦𝘴𝘵𝘦𝘳𝘯 𝘵𝘢𝘤𝘬 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘸𝘦𝘴𝘵𝘦𝘳𝘯 𝘴𝘱𝘰𝘳𝘵𝘴 𝘭𝘰𝘷𝘦 𝘪𝘵 𝘬𝘦𝘦𝘱 𝘶𝘱 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘢𝘸𝘦𝘴𝘰𝘮𝘦 𝘸𝘰𝘳𝘬

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing! And we appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts :)

reviews.review_description: The racing is quite fun but the spring sometimes will glitch and I can only charge. The cross country controls need a bit of work because I keep missing the jumps when I’m trying to turn. I love the bonding and breeding feature, I think it’s awsome that you can interact with the horses and how the horses have their own personalities. I can’t wait bro see what this game will bring in the future. x

This game was in my wishlist for a while, very polished game at launch, took a few races to get use to the controls but after that definitely very enjoyable & intense. Just hit rank 2 looking forward to breeding more horses and progressing through the races. Trying to get a feel of the game before jumping into multiplayer but definitely worth the buy so far. (A lot more to come also in the roadmap)

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts - we love hearing from our players, and we're stoked to hear that you are enjoying the game ❤️

reviews.review_description: This game is super awesome! I think it’s super realistic and very well put together. The caring for the horses must be my favorite part but so is the racing. If you’re thinking of buying this game I’d say it’s worth it!
Nothing new has been added once something new is added will update review
Started off very good, and now I can't even race without it crashing. With no fix or help

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear you're having trouble with our game! Could you please contact us at support@pikpok.com with more details? We want to look at this for you, but we'll first need more info from you.

reviews.review_description:
I really want to like this game but as it is, I can't. First and foremost...... teleport!! Why are g
ame developers still using teleport. That along with snap turn instantly makes me hate a game. To walk around the horse for brushing is useless. We are in VR, we want to walk and smooth turn. 
Then there's the controls. Turning a race it didn't matter what I did, shake and it would charge...push,  it would charge, then randomly sprint. Why is there not a coast, I'm either charging and pretty much going backwards or sprinting and using all the energy quickly. 
This ended up being a not enjoyable game. Pity

developer_response.body: Hi neeny.nugget. Thank you for sharing your thoughts on our game—we’re really sorry to hear it didn’t meet your expectations. We truly care about your experience, and your feedback can help us do better. If you’re open to it, could you please reach out to us at support@pikpok.com with more details? Hearing more about what didn’t work for you would really help us find the best way to improve.

reviews.review_description:
I love it, however I would love to see fences instead of the cross country racing, never been a fan of the cross country races in real life but I’m a huge horse racing fan. 

Would love to see courses like Cheltenham and Epsom added not sure if that’s possible 

I think adding a whip would be quite fun but I understand it why it’s not added.

Great job guys 👍

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts, and we are stoked to hear that you are enjoying the game :)

reviews.review_description:
As the title says, I am mostly enjoying this so far.

 Hate that the starter horse is a back preference. And the steering left or right is clunky most of the time. would much prefer it be done by using the joysticks rather than moving hands left or right, because my vr doesnt recognize the movement most of the time.

This game is so realistic and it really makes the person playing it feel envolved and truly part of the game, I will say one thing after about and hour and a half- two hours it’s started stuttering and glitching but that very well could have been from my headset itself, overall if you like horse games and enjoy the “farm life” aspect you should really consider purchasing this game! Ps The controls are very easy to learn and manage unlike some games.

Care for the horses is fun but basic. The riding controls are clunky and steering in the cross country is absolutely not existent. It’s a little glitchy and the environment “slides around” sometimes, which is disorienting. Looking forward to patches and updates.

developer_response.body: Hi ChorizoSally. Thanks so much for sharing your thoughts on our game! We're sorry to hear you're experiencing issues with the controls and visuals—that’s definitely something we’d like to look into. If you don’t mind, could you reach out to us at support@pikpok.com with more details? We really appreciate your feedback and would love the chance to make your experience better.

reviews.review_description: Let me tell you this is what the world needed!! I haven’t been able to ride in years and the pure joy I have had had even my family smiling just from watching me play. It’s still developing and I’m thankful for this as it needs some kinks worked out but man the potential is there and it’s so good. THANK YOU for this game

When I loaded up and played I was like wow ,for the price you can clearly see a lot of time and effort by developers to make game .

Would love if they added jumps to the race, and more people at finishing post .
If you could have horse drinking water ect ,
The grand national that would be amazing .
I use a couple more cushions under bottom to give the racing effect .
But we'll happy for the price great game with learning curve 9/10 .
There is a few glitches in the game when in the stable, you can go inside the horse and one where I had to reboot game as screen went blank sure it was when selling horse.

I've been looking at this for a while, and the videos looked fantastic, and the game looked fun. I've never been on a horse and never watched horse racing, but the game has really become addictive in just a matter of a couple of days since launch. Really enjoyable, and at times its a great workout. I would love the rotation to have an option of smooth turning instead of snap turn, I have movement as smooth, which is great but I find the rotation doesn't feel right.
Fantastic game and cant wait to see the updates.

The controls feel great. I bought this after they updated but it seems like the racing issues were fixed. I had no issues with sprinting/turning/etc.  
I enjoy the horse grooming aspect more than I expected. It’s fun “bonding” with em and leveling them up. But the main event is the racing … and for me, they knocked it outta the park. This is exactly how I pictured VR horse racing to feel.  Lookig forward to future updates!

Update: One slight complaint… I’ve reached the hurdles challenges, and it’s pretty tough, ngl. Controls don’t feel tight regarding turning.  Hoping this can get fixed cuz it’s a great addition to the racing portion… 
Honestly, this game could be one of the best vr games I’ve played if only it fixed a couple issues.

This is amazing, feels like I'm back as a stable hand when grooming the horses!

After playing the mobile app since it's launch, it's incredible to finally get to pet and bond with the horses! I love that they all have different petting preferences, brushes and food; it adds to the realism and personalities of the horses. I think it would be even better if some of the horses were more highly strung/naughty than others and some were super calm, quiet and bomb proof.

I would give 5 stars but as the game is at launch version I've been having some issues with chocking and stuttering as it threatens to crash after playing for so long and requires a restart. I haven't found a trigger for it, but the sound and picture both jitter, choke and lag until I restart the game, and sometimes the game won't load at all and I end up in a grey room and having to restart my Quest 2.

I'm super excited for future updates and to see what the game brings! Highly recommend 🙂.

developer_response.body:
I appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts :)

I've shared your feedback with our developers. Hopefully, we'll be able to take a closer look at your experience with stuttering, etc. Your review has helped us better understand where we are at!

reviews.review_description:
I preordered this game the day it came to the App Store and after a long wait, it’s finally here.

There are two individual story modes, those being flat races and cross country. They are set after the desktop and mobile versions so many characters may not act the same way. The characters are also fully voice acted which was a nice surprise.

The controls are hard at first, but get easier with practice. The horses are fantastic and each horse has a preferred food, petting spot and brush type. The more time you spend caring for your horse, the higher your bond with it will grow, providing stat boosts.

There is also a multiplayer mode, allowing people to race each other with their favourite horses.

The free roam mode is back from the desktop and mobile releases and is basically the same thing.

Overall, this game is an amazing add to my library and, despite being short, is an amazing experience. Don’t forget that the game is only two days old at the time of writing this review so updates are sure to fix any lingering bugs from development and increase playtime. 
I look forward to seeing how this game will grow!
Love this game,  very realistic!!

Awesome game!
The graphics are decent for the Quest, the audio is good, and the controls work and are fun. It took me a couple of races to figure it out, but once I did it was a blast. Also a good upper body workout running the races.
The one star reviews claiming the controls don’t work properly are bogus. The controls work just fine, and they’re really fun to use. I’m assuming those reviewers just can’t figure out the controls. Like I said, it took me a couple of races to figure out how to race to win. The only problem I have had is that I’ve gotten a couple of low memory warnings, and then got kicked back to the Quest menu, and had to restart the game. Luckily the auto-save feature works well, and I didn’t lose any progress. I’m confident they’ll fix whatever is causing this.
Great job, developers, and please keep improving, and adding to this game. I love it!

I am so pleasantly surprised with the first launch of this game. I’ve been following for what seems like forever for it to launch and they didn’t let me down. While the game is a little limited right now, I’m excited to get to play what’s in place and get my stables started. The graphics are amazing and the attention to detail such as simply opening and closing the stall stables is amazing. I’d love to see full wash racks and the ability to place a halter on the horse and lead line but that’s okay. I can’t wait to see future patches.
I absolutely love this game! But it would be better if they added multiplayer hacking!

reviews.review_title: I LOVE. This SO MUCH MAGIC 💞💞💞💞
reviews.review_description: this game is absolutely brilliant i enjoyed it no motion sickness cuz sometimes i get motion sickness with some games. but not this this was absolutely magical and the harmony that you get to experience it all makes sense and comes to life it is absolutely magic and i'm so happy that they also made this multiplayer and i also love bonding with the horse and the more you bond and love that horse the more that it will ride for you when you write as one i live in the city experiencing being on a farm is such peace and enjoyment and it's totally serene i actually wanna ride a real horse now the last time i road  a horse  12 ... so glad you brought this joy here thank you creators
Absolute cinema. Awesome game with great Grafics but could use some updates like a better roaming place but overall favourite game on my vr.

Really loving this game, would be 5 stars but as it has been mentioned some of the glitches, I can't win a race at all because the left rein doesn't want to work, I can't proceed any further in the game until I get in a fifth place spot. It is frustrating because I've tried for over 2 hours today ( off and on ) and I thought I was doing something wrong, but the left controller just won't recognize the left movement and then it will charge instead of sprinting, and then it won't even sprint at all. Will keep playing and try to do figure it out 
  Edit to add- I finally was able to breed my horse and after using my new horse, the handles and controls are much better. When I switched over to the first horse I received and tried to race with it again, it glitched and the controls were worse than  before. Put the first horse in the pasture and have been winning races and having a good time.

reviews.review_title: It’s good but having control issues
reviews.review_description:
It’s a really good game but the movement for sprinting and sprint re-charge is very similar and it makes its near impossible to win any races as it keeps getting mixed up.
Would be nice if you had to hold a button to differentiate the two controls easier.
Other than that, it’s really great!

developer_response.body: Hi Cmcbear16. Thanks so much for playing our game and for your kind words! We're sorry to hear you're having trouble with sprinting, and we really appreciate your suggestion for the controls. If you’re happy to share more, please get in touch with us at support@pikpok.com—we’d love to hear more and see how we can improve your experience!

reviews.review_description: Waited over a year for this to finally come out.  I think there are a few things that need a little more work. Like the steering of the horses.  Eventually I can turn it left but turning it right is very touch and go.  I do hope they do some updates to fix that. I love the breeding part.  Seeing what beautiful markings you can get.   All and all I find it a very enjoyable game. I'm not disappointed I got it.

Such a realistic horse racing game! I actually feel like I’m
Riding a real horse! 

The layout is brilliant and the commentary is spot on! Multiplayer with your friends is a blast and the single player experience is great with a good story line.  

The breeding format is very very clever amazing game!

Also… for people saying controls are non existent in cross country jumping it’s 100 percent a skill issue with yourself! I thought this until I persisted and it’s getting used to the SKILL of directing your horse!! I can hammer home gold every time now

Would be nice to be able to select a track in multiplayer rather than it being random, also private lobby set up, and be able to select your horse to match the course while in the multiplayer lobby
So frustrating, have not been able to play because it keeps kicking out of game

developer_response.body: Hi middlecollege. We're sorry to hear you're having trouble with our game! Could you please contact us at support@pikpok.com with more details? We’re keen to help!

reviews.review_description: Great game I love the graphics and how it puts you in there but Whenever I race and I want to sprint it makes me charge for some reason and I don’t know why it does that even tho I’m pulling back and forth to sprint idk if it’s me or if it’s finicky

developer_response.body: Hi XLuxCrazyX. Thanks so much for playing our game! We're sorry to hear you're having trouble with sprinting. If you’re up for it, we’d really appreciate it if you could contact us at support@pikpok.com with more details. We’re keen to help and want to make sure your controls are working as they should!

reviews.review_description: Really good for a game that’s pretty much just released, it’s really addictive and fun. I love the breeding and how many nice horses you can have, I just wish you could care for the horse until it grows up instead of skipping straight to it being an adult. More tack options would also be nice, but so far the game is way better than I expected. Also, it would be nice to have more ways to interact with the horse, maybe be able to change the mane and tail, and being able to customise your character would be cool.

As I play the game more the conrollers act up alot I can jump over the course without horse going nuts trying to make a jump. Also went back to races and maybe win one race out of 4 because conrollers don't work right. It's taking the fun out of it how am I suppose to get better

This game is overall very good but when doing cross country I miss some jumps because the horse won’t turn even tho my hands are like doing the turning motion 

Very good came but maybe patch those things and it will be perfect👍🏻

I love horses so this game was perfect, it felt so real and I felt like I had a connection with each of my horses! I did not know it was possible until now to love something inside of a screen😂. This is my new favorite game, I love it!

reviews.review_title: Love it but controls don’t work
reviews.review_description:
Was so looking forward to this game and at first was head over heels with it however once I unlocked cross country and free roam it went down hill. 

Controls to steer don’t work at all meaning I’m unable to Complete any cross country course or get the use of free roam. 
When racing if starting on the further side the race is always going to be a loss as again the controls don’t work to move the horse where it needs to go. 

I have since stopped playing it as it just get really frustrating knowing the game is good but I can’t get the benefit of it 

Fingers crossed they update this soon so I can jump back in

developer_response.body: Hi Red_Krez, we're truly sorry to hear about the frustration caused by the controls. That's definitely not the experience we want you to have. Could you please reach out to us at support@pikpok.com? We'll be happy to look into what's going on and see how we can help out.

reviews.review_description: This game shows that anything has a chance horse riding is not so popular but this Vrgame really did surprise me. It’s a little hard at first, but once you get used to it and get a breeding horses it’s so fun ￼￼
